subject: New health care bill TOMORROW

body:
Tomorrow, the GOP is releasing yet another Obamacare repeal bill and we have to be prepared to fight back.
---

_**The Hill: Senate GOP to offer new healthcare bill on Thursday**_
Team,

The GOP is releasing their new Obamacare repeal bill. TOMORROW.

And with Mitch McConnell bending the rules and skipping Senate committee process, odds are this bill will hit the ground running. So we have to be ready for whatever happens next.

If the GOP gets just 50 votes, Mike Pence will be on deck to cast the tie-breaking vote. With enough arm-twisting, that's definitely within reach -- and that's why it's so important that we ramp up the pressure on undecided Republicans.

[**We have to be prepared for tomorrow 's bill release and we're fighting back with ads calling out the damage this bill would cause. Can you chip in $1 now to help us hold Republicans accountable?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170712-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks to McConnell's secret negotiations and revisions, we're expecting more Republicans to jump on board as soon as he unveils this new bill.

Make no mistake -- none of the changes they made behind closed doors will make this bill any less disastrous for working families.

**Republicans are going to speed toward a vote once they drop this bill tomorrow, but if we act quickly, we can stop them in their tracks. Contribute right now toward the fight to save Obamacare:**

name: The White House
subject: President Trump travels to Paris
body:
The people of France have designated America this year's national guest of honor, to commemorate the 100th anniversary of the United States' entry into World War One.
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0be7177e700d9345c0010b6490140717b697b7b88bdd5f02dd9a0c1d9a2fd8302de73d1edf8d2c4752c55ea192b95a14c)**Today, President Donald J. Trump is in Paris, France for meetings and celebrations with America's oldest ally.** The President will meet with American military commanders and later with French President Macron. Tomorrow, the President will attend France's annual Bastille Day celebration--the first President to do so since 1989. [To commemorate the 100th anniversary of the United States' entry into World War One,](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb06f4cce085a4d41b9eceee3f60ba3f68e49ee881a901ab3ad72957b9406588717b0ed7dfd62c9ab663e0ce9d18e0b34f3) the people of France have designated America this year's national guest of honor. Troops from the US Army's First Infantry Division--the first unit to arrive on French soil in 1917--will march in the parade, and US Air Force Thunderbirds will conduct a flyover with planes from the French air force.
# Today's Events
_(All times EST)_**3:20 AM:** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump arrive at the U.S. Ambassador’s Residence**6:30 AM:** President Trump participates in a luncheon with leaders of the U.S. Military**9:25 AM:** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump arrive at Les Invalides and participate in an arrival ceremony - [Watch](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb00a38474eadffd30f599a5f4a11b2f85c29e79d483a88076891776c58f242ba9e8806c3ec731fd02200f43b282d5df155)**9:45 AM:** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump participate in a tour of Les Invalides**10:15 AM:** Vice President Pence participates in a series of meetings with lawmakers **10:35 AM:** President Trump participates in a meeting with President Emmanuel Macron of France**11:00 AM:** President Trump participates in an expanded bilateral meeting with President Macron**11:30 AM:** Vice President Pence delivers remarks to White House interns**12:25 PM:** President Trump holds a joint press conference with President Macron - [Watch](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0d7f8cc530f50139ae591831fc73d2714f76f0f60e534b2c3d5e9fb52e18ce3b9b86a459d64a74c5a6924435b5250edd6)**2:00 PM:** Vice President Pence participates in a listening session with representatives of the Philanthropy Roundtable **3:00 PM:** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump have dinner with President and Mrs. Macron
# Photo of the Day
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb05fa5ac0f2534f7e6d7047c2f3d23dcc22cf6ed76b0eb9c9e9f1ae129a5b38c4e39e0f673d15c0e2d9cc962dbba26060a)**President Donald J. Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, and World War II Veterans** | July 13, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)
# OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY
**FACT:**[Every insurer but one has exited Obamacare’s exchanges](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb035947a1ffae047f4cb884c7ac5acc892bfc1479c749bf130fee198a3ba4a394d7a383bf2777855a2e610d5e9d25ac5d9) in Alaska leaving the entire State with no choices. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb035947a1ffae047f4cb884c7ac5acc892bfc1479c749bf130fee198a3ba4a394d7a383bf2777855a2e610d5e9d25ac5d9)
# WHITE HOUSE UPDATES
**President Trump traveled to[Paris, France last night](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb03d12f1ce268071ff907afdf508b4112d2bccc2ced2dc8ed4db76e391acb766011bdf15c805958bb97bd76a91684f04e3)** to conduct meetings with President Macron and participate in the annual Bastille Day celebration. **The Congressional Budget Office[incorrectly predicted ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb05cccdf8f99b5feb43d11c33209ef30c15ee55d94dbf511de042ce7ef607c03b8a47dd879461d21395e7aa7ef4e12f4d4)** the number of Americans that would be covered by Obamacare this year. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb037886e4e982b2f01ed51455a2472775b5f44714ad889c37f7cb19de7490160d5288241e7f0c0e7083e2b43bd0e59e02c)**Yesterday, the House of Representatives passed three bills** that seek to end human trafficking, and the President is urging [ the Senate to pass these bills](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0b231d31781270530edbb8b9b1c25a296e5be421114611ace604d5f093213983eddd3933fdce80249b944dfd497516af4) so that he may sign them into law. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0297b6f55a48c48254c141280c840bc25ffdf013b2cbdadaece0602a390d4a0a701aafac044adf9505ba2e4316c5b35f3)
# West Wing Reads
Each day we put together a list of the top news stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. **[Sign up](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0fc254abf36213738b8aeb9b715c69acd71f26fa6cfa1db2a9012de2dc986d66113effd09d930cdf4c9781dec52a20f5d) to receive this daily update from the West Wing.**[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0fc254abf36213738b8aeb9b715c69acd71f26fa6cfa1db2a9012de2dc986d66113effd09d930cdf4c9781dec52a20f5d)
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0ccdae3d0c10e0c9e9a2ebee82429840cc4ff366f1d9fffe415baa36312d03bd8fedc2d9b6e02c636e93ea5934b8e18fc) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=20e459355ceb1cb0ecc140fa68e0128c81f6a82f056dc3a6654627a8125646e07661b4fbf8f4a30e411567c42d1a57f78531b49e6aacd30d) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d41c2db53a0449f2b5addf1bd286d231c43363df1ca90129bff547ebfbdb486d1af45ec43159bd818e0fb87a67ea5d36c7)

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: game-changing investments
body:
We're making big investments in every state.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats all across the country.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0a4/2057867489/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")**

Derek --

Our job is easy to sum up: we need to elect Democrats from school board to Senate and compete in every state. But for too long, we've been focused exclusively at the top of the ticket instead of building our bench and organizing from the ground up.

So we're getting back to basics, starting with an unprecedented investment in state Democratic parties and grassroots organizing efforts in every state and territory.

We're doubling our funding commitment to each state party from where we were two years ago, and we're launching a brand-new $10-million State Party Innovation Fund, giving every state the opportunity to build new programs to reach more voters and win elections at every level.

**[And it's all possible because of you, Derek -- because grassroots supporters like you believe in the work we're doing and pitch in to support it.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0a5/2057867489/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+And+its+all+possible+because+of+youCUSTO&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")**

These are the kinds of major, game-changing investments we need to win more elections, but whether or not we can make them comes down to you.

So I'm asking you to make a direct impact on Democratic victories in every state. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can today.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0a2/2057867489/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0a3/2057867489/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0a0/2057867489/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0a1/2057867489/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0ae/2057867489/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405232b5/4067b0a/37c076885/7e6ac0af/2057867489/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170713_tp_nd&source=em_20170713_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170713_tp_nd")
** Democrats across the country are ready to take on Trump and the GOP and fight for a brighter future for all Americans. If we keep organizing and channel that energy into wins at the polls, we'll be unstoppable.

So thanks for always standing with us -- that's how we'll win.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

name: Krista Bordelon
subject: This is about people, not politics
body:
I'm sharing my story because health care is personal **Watch Krista's story, and then make your voice heard. Tell Senate Republicans to protect affordable health care.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Krista1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170713_kb_v1s1&source=em_20170713_kb_v1s1")**
Derek --

There's a lot that goes into life as a single mom with limited income, but my biggest issue has always been health care.

I have three beautiful children -- nine, seven, and six -- and thankfully all of them have been on Medicaid for years. We live paycheck to paycheck and could barely sustain the cost of living, let alone the additional cost of health care premiums and deductibles.

Because my oldest son has autism, my daughter has seizures, and my youngest son has some behavioral issues, if it weren't for Medicaid, there's just no way I could have afforded to send them to the specialists they see or get them the tests and medications they have required. Those few hundred dollars a month were the reason my kids could get the care they need, and I have no idea where we would be without it.

**[That's why I'm sharing my story today, Derek. I hope you'll take a look -- and then tell your senators and representatives in Washington you want them to protect our health care.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Krista1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Thats+why+Im+sharing+my+story+todayCUSTO&utm_campaign=em_20170713_kb_v1s1&source=em_20170713_kb_v1s1")**

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Krista1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170713_kb_v1s1&source=em_20170713_kb_v1s1")
The debate surrounding health care seems to be based on political, religious, and social ideologies, but it's none of those things. It's an issue of humanity and compassion. It's about building a better society as a whole. It's about people, not politics.

We, the citizens, should be the driving force of the discussion. That means we have to show up. We have to go to the rallies and town halls, make calls, sign petitions, send emails, and talk to our friends and neighbors. It's our responsibility to make sure our representatives hear us and know where we stand when it comes to how they should be representing us.

**Add your name with mine, and call on our senators to protect our health care, not take it away:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Krista1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170713_kb_v1s1&source=em_20170713_kb_v1s1")**
We're at a unique moment right now, and when my kids are adults -- when they ask me if I believed that everyone should have affordable health care and if I fought for it -- I want to be able to say I was on the right side of history.

That's why I'm standing up and taking action, Derek. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining me.

Krista Bordelon
Louisiana

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: You've seen the GOP "Healthcare" Plan. Here's mine.
body:
#
Team --
Senate Republicans promised us a revised healthcare plan today, but it looks like this is still a plan to cut taxes for the wealthiest Americans while millions of us lose access to life-saving healthcare coverage.
In my humble opinion, healthcare plans should include, well, healthcare. And since the Senate Republicans seem either unable or unwilling to provide a plan like that, then I'm happy to step up to the plate. [**Read some of my healthcare policies for Florida below, and if you agree, add your name to endorse my plan:**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602a/2129809070/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/endorsehealthcare")
**Enshrining Healthcare as a Right:**
I have proposed a constitutional amendment declaring that affordable healthcare is a fundamental right of all Floridians. The draft of this amendment reads as follows: "Affordable health care is a fundamental right of all Floridians. In weighing priorities and allocating available resources, the Legislature shall afford the highest consideration to securing this right."
**Covering Preexisting Conditions:**
In my first legislative session, I plan to work with lawmakers to draft, pass, and sign a bill that creates the nation's strongest state protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Under this bill, insurers would be prohibited from denying coverage or benefits for any pre-existing conditions, charging more on the basis of preexisting conditions, or charging more based on sex or gender identity.
**Protecting Women 's Health Access:**
In addition to proudly standing with organizations like Planned Parenthood, I proposed a policy to ensure women continue to have access to no-cost contraception. This plan would require that all health policies must provide coverage for any FDA-approved prescription contraceptive drug or device. Additionally, insurers would be prohibited from charging a co-pay or other costs for contraception.
**Addressing the Opioid Crisis:**
Opioid drugs are currently claiming the lives of 14 Floridians per day. To address this crisis, I plan to create a task force that will bring together law enforcement, mental health and treatment professionals, public health leaders, addiction recovery and sober home experts, patient advocates, and lawmakers to develop a comprehensive strategy that directs state and federal funds into a comprehensive solution. I will also work to pass and sign a bill creating opioid intervention courts around the state. With accelerated hearings, daily accountability, and strict curfews, the courts will reduce recidivism and save lives.
**Providing Mental Health Funding:**
Right now, Florida ranks nearly last in the nation in per-capita mental health funding -- and worse yet, our state just cut that spending by $11 million. When I'm Governor, I will press lawmakers to restore and expand mental health and substance abuse treatment funding at the state level, while working with Florida's Congressional delegation to secure additional federal funding.
[**If you like what you read above, add your name to endorse my plan, and then be sure to forward this email to your family and friends:**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602a/2129809070/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/endorsehealthcare")
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602a/2129809070/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/endorsehealthcare")**
My plan might not have much in the way of tax breaks for the wealthy -- but I think it has the potential to do a whole lot of good here in Florida, no matter what happens in Congress.
Bring it home,
Andrew
PS: Have any ideas for healthcare policies we should add? [**You can submit them right here.**](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602a/2129809070/VEsC/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/endorsehealthcare")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602d/2129809070/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-july2017?refcode=em20170713-endorsehc")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602c/2129809070/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602f/2129809070/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](https://gillum.bsd.net/page/m/fcb32f0/9e00690/4d9e6b66/2403602e/2129809070/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

| | Peter,

After weeks of working in secret, Senate Republicans released a new version of their bill to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and frankly, it's just more of the same.

This bill:
* Still guts Medicaid
* Still allows premiums to be up to five times more expensive for seniors
* Still lets insurance companies cancel your coverage when you need it most
* And it _still_ makes it harder for states like Indiana to fight the opioid epidemic

**Republicans and their dark-money donors know that I'm going to fight this bill every step of the way, which is why they've singled me out as a top target in 2018.[Can you chip in $5 to my campaign today so I can stay in the Senate and keep fighting for you?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2686/7377f838/36efcb13/51fb0031/1897677219/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170713nd&amount=10")**

This isn't a health care bill -- it's a wealth transfer bill, heaping tax cut after tax cut on the ultra rich and taking crucial benefits from middle- and working-class Americans to pay for it. And maybe I sound like a broken record, but I want you to know: **I don't support this bill or _any_ bill that will cause Hoosiers to lose their coverage.**

Peter, Republicans are practically salivating at the chance to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extreme agenda. **[We can beat them, but we have to do it together. Will you chip in $5 to my campaign today?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2686/7377f838/36efcb13/51fb0031/1897677219/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-hip?refcode=20170713nd&amount=10")**
